control_center.tooltip.ready:
OBS is ready
Left click {primaryAction}
Right click toggles recording
Middle click toggles the replay buffer
control_center.tooltip.needs_restart:
OBS is running, but WebSocket control is unavailable
Restart OBS once to restore controls
panel.header.title: OBS Control
panel.header.active: Active outputs: {outputs}. Manage capture, replay, or streaming from here.
panel.header.ready: OBS is connected and ready for recording, replay, or streaming.
panel.header.qt_websockets_missing: Qt WebSockets support is unavailable in this Quickshell runtime. Install qt6-websockets to enable OBS controls.
panel.header.config_missing: OBS websocket config is missing or disabled. Open OBS, enable obs-websocket, and try again.
panel.header.needs_restart: OBS is open, but WebSocket control is unavailable until it is restarted once.
panel.header.offline: OBS is offline. Launch it here and the widget will track its state.
panel.status.label: Status
panel.status.connected_hint: Left click {primaryAction}. Right click toggles recording, middle click toggles replay, and the panel exposes streaming and save actions.
panel.status.qt_websockets_missing_hint: Qt WebSockets support is missing in this Quickshell runtime. Install qt6-websockets, then restart Noctalia to enable OBS controls.
panel.status.config_missing_hint: OBS websocket config is missing or disabled. Open OBS, enable obs-websocket, then restart or refresh the plugin.
panel.status.disconnected_hint: WebSocket control is unavailable right now. Launch or restart OBS to restore quick actions.
panel.status.managed_hint: Plugin-managed launches can close OBS after the last active recording, replay, or stream stops.
settings.header.label: OBS Control
settings.header.description: Choose how OBS appears in the bar, Control Center, and quick actions.
settings.sections.behavior.label: Quick Actions
settings.sections.behavior.description: Set what clicks do and how OBS launches when you ask the plugin to open it.
settings.sections.bar.label: Bar
settings.sections.bar.description: Keep Always Show enabled if you want the OBS button to stay in the same spot all the time.
settings.sections.control_center.label: Control Center
settings.sections.control_center.descrip: Choose when the shortcut should appear. Leave Ready off if you only want it during active sessions.
settings.sections.videos.label: Videos & Automation
settings.sections.videos.description: Choose where recordings open and what the plugin should do after capture stops.
settings.runtime.qt_websockets_missing: Install qt6-websockets and restart Noctalia to enable OBS control.
settings.runtime.websocket_config_missin: Enable obs-websocket in OBS, then refresh or restart Noctalia.
settings.poll_interval.label: Refresh Interval
settings.poll_interval.description: How often to refresh OBS state, in milliseconds.
settings.left_click_action.label: Left Click
settings.left_click_action.description: Pick the primary action for the bar and Control Center button.
settings.launch_behavior.label: Launch OBS
settings.launch_behavior.description: Only used for the manual Launch OBS action. Automatic starts still open minimized to tray.
settings.bar_label_mode.label: Label Style
settings.bar_label_mode.description: Choose how active OBS states appear in the bar.
settings.videos_path.label: Videos Folder
settings.videos_path.description: Leave empty to use your default Videos directory.
settings.videos_opener.label: Folder Opener
settings.videos_opener.description: Command used to open the Videos folder, for example xdg-open or your file manager.
settings.auto_close_managed.label: Close OBS After Managed Sessions
settings.auto_close_managed.description: If the plugin launched OBS for you, close it again after the last active output stops.
settings.open_videos_after_stop.label: Offer Open Videos After Save
settings.open_videos_after_stop.descript: Show an Open Videos action after recording stops or a replay is saved.
settings.show_elapsed_in_bar.label: Show Elapsed Time
settings.show_elapsed_in_bar.description: Show the timer in the bar when Label Style is set to Duration Labels.
settings.show_bar_recording.label: While Recording
settings.show_bar_recording.description: Keep the bar button visible during recording.
settings.show_bar_replay.label: While Replay Is Active
settings.show_bar_replay.description: Keep the bar button visible while only the replay buffer is running.
settings.show_bar_streaming.label: While Streaming
settings.show_bar_streaming.description: Keep the bar button visible during streaming.
settings.always_show_in_bar.label: Always Show In Bar
settings.always_show_in_bar.description: Keep the bar button visible even when OBS is idle or offline so its position stays stable.
settings.show_control_center_recording.d: Show the Control Center shortcut during recording.
settings.show_control_center_replay.desc: Show the Control Center shortcut while the replay buffer is active.
settings.show_control_center_streaming.d: Show the Control Center shortcut during streaming.
settings.show_control_center_ready.label: When OBS Is Ready
settings.show_control_center_ready.descr: Keep the shortcut visible while OBS is connected but idle.
toast.record_started.title: OBS recording started
toast.record_started_launch.title: OBS recording started
toast.record_stopped.title: OBS recording stopped
toast.record_stopped_autoclose.title: OBS recording stopped
toast.record_stopped_autoclose.body: Recording saved to Videos. OBS closed.
toast.stream_started.title: OBS stream started
toast.stream_started_launch.title: OBS stream started
toast.stream_stopped.title: OBS stream stopped
toast.stream_stopped_autoclose.title: OBS stream stopped
toast.replay_started.title: OBS replay buffer started
toast.replay_started_launch.title: OBS replay buffer started
toast.replay_stopped.title: OBS replay buffer stopped
toast.replay_stopped_autoclose.title: OBS replay buffer stopped
toast.replay_stopped_autoclose.body: Instant replay is off. OBS closed.
toast.replay_saved.title: OBS replay saved
toast.replay_saved.body: Saved the last replay buffer to Videos.
toast.offline.title: OBS is offline
toast.offline.body: Launch OBS to use recording controls.
toast.qt_websockets_missing.title: Qt WebSockets support missing
toast.qt_websockets_missing.body: Qt WebSockets support is unavailable in this Quickshell runtime. Install qt6-websockets to enable OBS controls.
toast.websocket_config_missing.title: OBS websocket not configured
toast.websocket_config_missing.body: OBS websocket config is missing or disabled. Open OBS, enable obs-websocket, and try again.
toast.error.title: OBS control failed
